name: @engram/sdk
description: Clean, ergonomic TypeScript client for the durable Engram kernel — durable JS REPL sessions over WebSocket (kernel) or HTTP (cloud), with typed results and errors.

scripts.build: tsc --noEmit && esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --format=esm --platform=neutral --target=es2022 --external:node:* --outfile=dist/index.mjs && esbuild src/effect.ts --bundle --format=esm --platform=neutral --target=es2022 --external:node:* --external:effect --outfile=dist/effect.mjs && tsc --emitDeclarationOnly --outDir dist
